title: Fool's Cap
description: Adds 40+ New Jester Hats To Your World!
body:
Rename a carved pumpkin to any of the options listed below!

## This pack is Optifine REQUIRED!

# 3 Tipped Designs
-   Brown Jester Hat
-   Red Jester Hat
-   Orange Jester Hat
-   Yellow Jester Hat
-   Lime Jester Hat
-   Green Jester Hat
-   Cyan Jester Hat
-   Light Blue Jester Hat
-   Blue Jester Hat
-   Purple Jester Hat
-   Magenta Jester Hat
-   Pink Jester Hat
-   White Jester Hat
-   Light Gray Jester Hat
-   Gray Jester Hat
-   Black Jester Hat

# 4 Tipped Designs
